item.title: Bayesian Additive Regression Trees
item.description: Definition: Variant of Bagging and Boosting (Machine Learning) for trees where boosting occurs via making small changes to pre-existing trees in order to better fit Residuals.

item.title: Temporary Notes for Jonathan Wang
item.description: I’m testing Quartz to publish some notes I’ve collected in Obsidian.

item.title: Classification
item.description: Definition: A type of Supervised Machine Learning where the output space is a set of CLASSES (mutually exclusive) \mathcal{Y} = \{1, 2, ..., C\} \mathcal{Y}={\text{True}, \text{False}} Examples: Binary Classification is only two classes.
